\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{article}
\usepackage[margin=0.6in]{geometry}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}

% Remove page numbers
\pagestyle{empty}

% Section formatting
\titleformat{\section}{\large\bfseries\uppercase}{}{0em}{}[\titlerule]
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{10pt}{6pt}

% Subsection formatting
\titleformat{\subsection}[runin]{\bfseries}{}{0em}{}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{6pt}{4pt}

% Tight lists
\setlist[itemize]{nosep, left=0pt..1.5em, label=\textbullet}

\begin{document}

% ===== HEADER =====
\begin{center}
    {\LARGE\bfseries FULL NAME} \\[4pt]
    City, State \enspace|\enspace Phone \enspace|\enspace Email \enspace|\enspace \href{https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile}{LinkedIn}
\end{center}

% ===== SUMMARY =====
\section{Professional Summary}
2--3 sentences tailored to the target role. Incorporate top JD keywords naturally. Highlight years of experience, core domain, and key value proposition.

% ===== SKILLS =====
\section{Skills}
\textbf{Category 1:} Skill 1, Skill 2, Skill 3 \\
\textbf{Category 2:} Skill 1, Skill 2 \\
\textbf{Category 3:} Skill 1, Skill 2 \\
\textbf{Category 4:} Skill 1, Skill 2

% ===== EXPERIENCE =====
\section{Work Experience}

\textbf{Job Title} \hfill \textbf{MMM YYYY -- Present} \\
\textit{Company Name} \hfill \textit{City, State}
\begin{itemize}
    \item Action verb + what you did + with what technology + measurable result
    \item Bullet 2
    \item Bullet 3
\end{itemize}

\textbf{Job Title} \hfill \textbf{MMM YYYY -- MMM YYYY} \\
\textit{Company Name} \hfill \textit{City, State}
\begin{itemize}
    \item Bullet 1
    \item Bullet 2
    \item Bullet 3
\end{itemize}

% ===== PROJECTS =====
\section{Projects}

\textbf{Project Name} --- Technologies: X, Y, Z
\begin{itemize}
    \item Key accomplishment or feature
    \item Key accomplishment or feature
\end{itemize}

% ===== EDUCATION =====
\section{Education}

\textbf{Degree in Major} \hfill \textbf{Graduation Year} \\
\textit{University Name} \hfill \textit{City, State}

% ===== CERTIFICATIONS =====
\section{Certifications}
\begin{itemize}
    \item Certification Name --- Issuing Organization, Year
    \item Certification Name --- Issuing Organization, Year
\end{itemize}
